sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63407" key="linopluth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐνο-πλῠτής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63407.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flax-washer, flax-soaker</tr_>, prob. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.16</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λινοπλήτων</foreign> gen. pl., codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
